critic_raw:
ASSESSOR 1:
Verdict: critique_wins

Three compounding issues: calibration asymmetry (AUROC is threshold-free but deployment framing is affected), hotspot gene composition advantage (40% from two well-characterized sarcomere genes), and inadequate comparison set for the modern-claim framing.
defender_raw:
ASSESSOR 2:
Verdict: critique_wins

All three issues confirmed by paper. The 'foundation-model representations' claim is unsupported by comparison against only PolyPhen-2. The hotspot gene composition is directly documented in the supplementary table.

ASSESSOR 3:
Verdict: critique_wins

The evaluation has design problems at the benchmark composition level (hotspot concentration) and the baseline selection level (PolyPhen-2 only). The stated claim about foundation models requires significantly broader comparison.
adjudication_raw: Unanimous critique_wins across all three assessors. Verdict: critique_wins.
